introSection: Blazing Fury is an enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. The ride is based on Fire In The Hole at Silver Dollar City.

sections.title: History
sections.content:
The ride was under refurbishment from January 6, 2025 through July 3, 2025. It reopened on July 4. Some of the ride's track was replaced with a variant of Titan Track from Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions during this refurbishment. The waterfall area was reconstructed and the characters were also given new costumes.

As of 2025 or earlier, one of the retired ride vehicles is on display at the National Roller Coaster Museum.

sections.title: External Links
sections.content: * Blazing Fury on the park's website

fullText:
Blazing Fury is an enclosed dark ride roller coaster located at Dollywood in Pigeon Forge, Tennessee, USA. The ride is based on Fire In The Hole at Silver Dollar City.

The ride was under refurbishment from January 6, 2025 through July 3, 2025. It reopened on July 4. Some of the ride's track was replaced with a variant of Titan Track from Great Coasters International and Skyline Attractions during this refurbishment. The waterfall area was reconstructed and the characters were also given new costumes.

As of 2025 or earlier, one of the retired ride vehicles is on display at the National Roller Coaster Museum.






 * Blazing Fury on the park's website
